title: Chat Wave 1C - History Lineage Governed Actions
notes: Repo-native staging shard for history, lineage, telemetry, and governed-action candidates from chat wave 1.
transcript-replay-artifact, transcript-linked-code-lineage, fail-closed-evidence-gate, and approval-bound-durable-jobs have now landed as AOA-T-0066 through AOA-T-0069.
First pass is registry-first and does not create seed bundles.
agent-readiness-telemetry and signed-trace-artifacts now stay narrowing-only with explicit memos.
Landed history artifact family and confirmation-boundary techniques remain authoritative.
